title: neomammillaria schelhasei
intro: Neomammillaria schelhasei, also known as Schelhas' Pincushion Cactus, is a species of flowering cactus native to Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Neomammillaria schelhasei include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
